title: cantleya corniculata
intro: Cantleya corniculata, also known as the elephant ear or elephant tusk, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. Cantleya corniculata has been traditionally used to promote health and well-being, with reported benefits including reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system function. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in traditional medicine in the form of poultices, salves, and ointments.
